memberdef.name: XPAR_SPI_0_SLAVE_ONLY
memberdef.initializer: FALSE /* Is the device slave only? */

memberdef.name: XPAR_SPI_1_SLAVE_ONLY
memberdef.initializer: FALSE /* Is the device slave only? */

memberdef.name: XPAR_FLASH_0_PART_WIDTH
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* Width of each part in bytes */

memberdef.name: XPAR_FLASH_0_PART_MODE
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* Mode of each part in bytes */
